framework.name: $3-5T Agentic Commerce by 2030
framework.description: McKinsey projects agentic commerce at $3-5T globally by 2030; Morgan Stanley estimates 10-20% of US e-commerce via AI agents by decade's end. Scale numbers that make the per-transaction latency question economically critical.
framework.raw_quote: McKinsey projects agentic commerce will reach $3-5 trillion globally by 2030. Morgan Stanley estimates AI agents could drive 10-20% of U.S. e-commerce by decade's end.

source.title: Google's Universal Commerce Protocol: What It Means for Payment ...
